node.statement: (Multiplicity bound for block-diagonal case). dim_R(π_φ(A)'^{sa}) = Σ_{i ∈ I} r_i². The main theorem gives Σ_{i ∈ I} r_i² ≤ m + 1. This is a simultaneous constraint: it bounds both max_i r_i (the maximum rank in any single block) and |I| (the number of active blocks). For example, if all r_i = 1 then |I| ≤ m+1 (Carathéodory-type); if |I| = 1 then r_1² ≤ m+1 (BP-type). The constraint Σ r_i² ≤ m+1 interpolates between these extremes and is genuinely new for |I| > 1 with some r_i > 1.
